query:
-- 1. Actualizar la reserva 630003 a estado CONFIRMADA y PAGADO (el pago pendiente ya está paid)
UPDATE reservations SET
  status = 'paid',
  status_reservation = 'CONFIRMADA',
  status_payment = 'PAGADO',
  amount_paid = 9000,
  channel = 'ONLINE_ASISTIDO',
  quote_id = 540003,
  quoteSource = 'presupuesto',
  updated_at = UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000,
  paid_at = UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
WHERE id = 630003;

-- 2. Vincular el pago pendiente 30001 con la reserva 630003
UPDATE pending_payments SET
  reservation_id = 630003,
  updated_at = UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
WHERE id = 30001;
